creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kai Burghardt from comment #2)
It is marked as "Component: Security" and all such PRs are handed over to
secteam@ and marked as non-accessible by the public.  (Only secteam@ and
bugmeister@ can see them.)

In this case nothing of a highly threatening level seems to have been
disclosed, even in the resulting commits.  Apparently the problem has
been fixed and MFCed.
